name: Relish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine salt, brown sugar, dry mustard, and cider vinegar.
Stir until everything is well blended.
2. Add chopped cabbage, bell pepper, and celery to the mixture.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated with the dressing.
4. Serve chilled. Makes 3 1/2 cups
